generatedArtifacts.tailoredResumeSummary: Uploaded resume Arpit_CV.pdf was used as the primary context. Focused C/C++, Python, Java, JavaScript to match the Software Engineer, AI Solutions(Contarct-12 Months) role at Jobs.
generatedArtifacts.coverLetterExcerpt: I am excited to apply for the Software Engineer, AI Solutions(Contarct-12 Months) role at Jobs. My background in C/C++, Python, Java and my focus on becoming a strong Software Engineer make this opportunity especially compelling to me. I would be glad to contribute to Jobs's team with a practical, detail-oriented approach to building reliable backend systems and supporting product delivery in onsite engineering environments. With my academic foundation and hands-on project work, I am confident I can add value while continuing to grow in a role aligned with Gurugram, Haryana, India opportunities.

shortAnswers.question: Why are you interested in this role?
shortAnswers.answer: This role aligns with my goal of becoming a strong Software Engineer and uses skills I have already practiced through projects and coursework.

shortAnswers.question: What makes you a match?
shortAnswers.answer: My background in C/C++, Python, Java, JavaScript closely matches the technical expectations in the job description.
